flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Oberlin College rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($34.2k → $40.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Oberlin College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.2k → $67.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Oberlin College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Oberlin College are 50% above 6-year earnings ($38.9k → $58.3k).
